query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A close-up portrait of a person with their face turned slightly upward, showing one eye, the nose, cheek, and lips on the left side against an unlit background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up portrait of a person with their face turned slightly upward, rendered with extreme underexposure that buries most of the face and background in crushed shadow, leaving only fragments of one eye, the nose, cheek, and lips visible and cultivating an oppressive atmosphere of dread and unease.
